hours: Daytime, weather permitting (check daily schedule onboard)
reservations: Walk-in for general use, reservations required for private lessons
what_makes_it_unique: The FlowRider allows guests to experience the thrill of surfing or boogie boarding on a simulated wave right on the deck of a cruise ship, offering an active and unique water sports experience at sea.
warnings: Height and weight restrictions apply for safety.
Guests are required to sign a waiver before participating.
Operation is subject to weather and sea conditions.
Long lines can form during peak times.
